title: rubus × lemassonii
intro: Rubus × lemassonii, also known as the hybrid raspberry or Lemasson's raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the fragaria species, resulting in a unique and beneficial plant. The leaves and stems of Rubus × lemassonii possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been shown to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus × lemassonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
